evals.name: console-chinese-handoff-review
evals.expected_output: 读取 Console R2 handoff JSON，识别中文内容不翻译，整理 Markdown 和图片，先写入 ai/articles/review/<slug>/，等待用户确认，不更新 ai/manifest.json

evals.name: console-english-handoff-translation
evals.prompt: 把这个中台英文长文入知识库：r2://mockingbird-content/knowledge-imports/console/2026-06-04/twitter-english-42.json
evals.expected_output: 读取 Console R2 handoff JSON，按 terminology.json 翻译英文正文，生成中文 Markdown，先进入 review 状态并等待人工确认

evals.name: console-handoff-review-gate
evals.prompt: 这篇中台文章做成知识库文章：r2://mockingbird-content/knowledge-imports/console/2026-06-04/twitter-review-42.json
evals.expected_output: 完成 review 草稿后停止并请求确认；在用户明确确认前不得写入 ai/manifest.json 或发布到 ai/articles/published
